$comment: v0.1 produced 2026-04-27 (Madhav_M2A_Exec_11) — cluster register schema for CLUSTER_ATLAS_v1_0.json. Follows structural conventions of pattern_schema_v0_1.json.
title: MARSYS-JIS Cluster Atlas Entry Schema v0.1
description: Schema for cluster entries in 035_DISCOVERY_LAYER/REGISTERS/CLUSTER_ATLAS_v1_0.json. Produced at Madhav_M2A_Exec_11 (2026-04-27) per PHASE_B_PLAN_v1_0.md §B.5 + CLAUDECODE_BRIEF §9 (AC.5).

cluster_label.description: 3–6 word descriptive label for the cluster theme.

dominant_domain.description: Primary domain that dominates this cluster's signal composition.

sub_domains.description: Secondary domains present in this cluster alongside the dominant domain.

signal_ids.description: MSR signal IDs (≥3) that are central members of this cluster.

chunk_ids.description: RAG chunk UUIDs that are members of this cluster (from rag_chunks table).

centroid_method.description: Clustering algorithm used to produce this cluster.

cluster_size_n.description: Number of chunks (embeddings) in this cluster. Minimum 3 per quality gate.

pass_1_actor.description: Actor that produced Pass-1 annotation. Per PHASE_B_PLAN §B.5: cluster Pass-1 is 'gemini' (Gemini→Claude two-pass ordering for DISCOVERS/ANNOTATES edge type).

confidence.description: Confidence in the cluster annotation (0.0–1.0). Minimum 0.60 threshold per Claude Pass-2 gate.

significance.description: Significance of this cluster within the corpus (0.0–1.0).

annotation.description: 2–4 sentence annotation explaining the structural theme uniting this cluster in the native's chart. Must reference at least one L1 fact from FORENSIC_v8_0.

ledger_event_ids.description: Two-pass trail: [cluster_proposal event_id, claude_cluster_accept event_id]. Both required.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of cluster acceptance.

created_by_session.description: Session ID that accepted this cluster annotation.
